definition: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces an I2S-planted concrete byte with a <GAP> abstraction, destroying the exact byte-value that bare cmplog retains, so a single-byte equality gate goes unresolved.

Grimoire's GeneralizationStage re-execution and structural recombination mutators produce short, fragmented inputs that fail to advance the parser far enough to satisfy a buffer-fullness threshold, while cmplog's I2S plus havoc builds coherent long inputs that pass it.
